LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY 18, 2026. PLAINTIFF FILED HIS SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IN FEDERAL COURT BUT THE COMPLAINT IS NOT ON FILE AS A PLEADING IN THIS COURT. THE COURT GRANTS LEAVE TO PLAINTIFF TO FILE THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT ATTACHED AS EXHIBIT B TO THE SHOYKET DECLARATION, BUT WITH A STATE-COURT CAPTION, BY MAY 11, 2026. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THAT PLEADING SHALL BE DEEMED FILED ON MAY 12, 2026, AND THE COURT WILL DECIDE THE DEMURRER ON THE CURRENT BRIEFING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

PLAINTIFF FILED HIS SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IN FEDERAL COURT BUT THE COMPLAINT IS NOT ON FILE AS A PLEADING IN THIS COURT. THE COURT GRANTS LEAVE TO PLAINTIFF TO FILE THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT ATTACHED AS EXHIBIT B TO THE SHOYKET DECLARATION, BUT WITH A STATE-COURT CAPTION, BY MAY 11, 2026. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Continued To Sep-02-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Text Ruling

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Text Ruling

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Continued To May-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Continued on the court's own motion to May 18, 2026. Plaintiff filed his Second Amended Complaint in federal court but the complaint is not on file as a pleading in this court. The court grants leave to plaintiff to file the Second Amended Complaint attached as Exhibit B to the Shoyket Declaration, but with a state-court caption, by May 11, 2026. Defendant's demurrer to that pleading shall be deemed filed on May 12, 2026, and the court will decide the demurrer on the current briefing.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Continued To May-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED OMPLAINT.

Continued on the court's own motion to May 18, 2026. Plaintiff filed his Second Amended Complaint in federal court but the complaint is not on file as a pleading in this court. The court grants leave to plaintiff to file the Second Amended Complaint attached as Exhibit B to the Shoyket Declaration, but with a state-court caption, by May 11, 2026. Defendant's motion to strike shall be deemed filed on May 12, 2026, and the court will decide the motion to strike on the current briefing.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
